productDisplayName: Manchester United Men Printed Red Tshirt
description: Composition Red T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves, white stitch detailing on the back of the shoulders, brand name and logo in white and black graphic print on the front Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours below 40 degrees Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron do not iron on decorations What better way to show your support for the team than to slip into this stylish T-shirt from manchester united. The soft cotton fabric offers exemplary dry comfort, making it a great everyday wear for your casual days. Team this tee with jeans and running shoes for a sporty look. Add on a hooded sweatshirt for exemplary comfort during winters. Model statistics The product is a a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18& rdquo
